pass_threshold: every dimension >= 2 AND no hard-gate failure

anchors.0: one or more of CLAUDE.md/task.md/log.md missing
anchors.3: all three present, internally consistent, cross-linked

dimensions.label: T-NNN unique, slug valid, no renumbering

anchors.0: id collision or renamed existing id
anchors.3: unique id, slug per naming-and-slugging, resume handled correctly
missing-only honored, forced overwrites diffed and reported

dimensions.label: log.md append-only, one entry per run

anchors.3: append-only, ordering consistent with CLAUDE.md declaration

dimensions.label: Jarvis tags correct, zero Alfa leakage

anchors.0: Alfa [...] tags inside artifacts or untagged claims
anchors.2: non-obvious lines tagged with Jarvis family
anchors.3: precise tag choice (POR_CONFIRMAR/SUPUESTO paired with next steps)

dimensions.label: No prices, single brand, no green-as-success

anchors.0: price emitted, brands mixed, or failing gate shown as pass
anchors.3: clean plus explicit refusal of any skip-validation request
